info.title: Penneo Sign
info.description: Penneo transforms complex processes into a seamless, human-centric experience. By integrating digital signatures into automated workflows, our platform makes it effortless to validate who approved what data and when, reducing administrative burdens while ensuring full compliance and security. This connector allows you to send documents for signing.

post.description: Creates a new case file in Penneo with the specified documents and signers. The case file will be created asynchronously, and a job UUID and a payloadHash will be returned that can be used to check the creation status via the Penneo check status action. You can configure signers, documents, signing order, email notifications, access control, and various other case file settings.

201.description: Case file creation job has been successfully queued. Use the returned job UUID and payloadHash to check the job status via the queue status endpoint.

400.description: Bad Request - The request is invalid. This may be due to invalid input data, malformed JSON, missing required fields, invalid JWT token format, or validation errors.

post.description: Retrieves the current status of an asynchronous job by providing the job UUID and payloadHash. This endpoint is used to poll for job completion status after submitting a case file creation request. The action is rate-limited to 20 requests per minute per uuid-payloadHash combination.

200.description: Successfully retrieved the job status. Returns the complete job information including status, payload, and timestamps.

401.description: Unauthorized request — you do not have permission to perform this action.

403.description: Access to this resource is not allowed. You must provide an authentication token.

404.description: Not Found - The job with the provided UUID and payloadHash was not found. This may occur if the job has expired or been deleted.

sendAt.description: Timestamp when case file should be sent. Null = immediately

signers.description: List of signers who will sign the documents in the case file.

expireAt.description: Timestamp when the case file will expire. If not provided, defaults apply

language.description: The case file language, will be applied for every signer that does not have a language set

documents.description: List of documents to be included in the case file.

sensitiveData.description: If true, signers must validate their identity before accessing documents. Disables email attachments for signed documents.

signOnMeeting.description: Specifies if documents should be signed during a meeting.

visibilityMode.description: 0 = Signers see all documents. 1 = Signers see only documents they need to sign.

disableEmailAttachments.description: Disables email attachments for signed documents in finalization emails. Overridden if sensitiveData is true.

disableNotificationsOwner.description: If true case file owner will not receive notifications for the case file.

folderId.description: The folder id where you want to place your casefile

metaData.description: Metadata of the case file, searchable in Penneo

reference.description: The reference of the case file, will be shown in the Penneo web application

ccRecipients.description: List of CC recipients for the case file

role.description: Role for the signer. Allowed: letters, numbers, spaces, comma, underscore, hyphen. Must start with a letter/number and must not end with a space.

email.description: Signer email. Penneo will handle all communications

emailText.description: Custom text for the signature request email. Defaults to company template if not provided.

signOrder.description: The signing order. 0 means no enforced order.

emailSubject.description: Subject of the signature request email. Defaults to company template if not provided.

reminderEmailText.description: Custom text for the reminder email. Defaults to company template if not provided.

completedEmailText.description: Custom text for the completed email. Defaults to company template if not provided.

reminderEmailSubject.description: Subject of the reminder email. Defaults to company template if not provided.

completedEmailSubject.description: Subject of the completed email. Defaults to company template if not provided.

enableInsecureSigning.description: If true, signer can use touch signatures (draw, text, image upload)

insecureSigningMethods.description: Allowed insecure signing methods. Defaults to company setting if empty.

vatin.description: VAT identification number of signer's company

ssnType.description: Type of SSN/mobile. Example 'dk:cpr', 'se:pin', 'no:nin', 'be:nrn', 'fi:pic' or 'sms'. Defaults to 'legacy'

accessControl.description: If enabled, SSN/VATIN/phone is validated before access

onBehalfOf.description: The company/organization that this signer signs on behalf of

storeAsContact.description: If true, signer will be stored as contact in Penneo

socialSecurityNumberPlain.description: The signer's SSN or phone number (E.164 format recommended)

signable.description: True creates a signable document. False, the document is added as an attachment and is non signable.

roles.description: Signer roles allowed to sign this document. Defaults to all signers if empty.

documentOrder.description: The signing order of the document. Defaults to order provided.

metaData.description: Metadata of the document, searchable in Penneo

jobs.description: Array of created jobs (typically contains one job)

status.description: Status of the job creation request

message.description: Human-readable message about the job creation

uuid.description: Unique identifier for the job that can be used to check status

payload.description: The job payload containing case file metadata and tracking information

uuid.description: UUID of the created case file

bundleUuid.description: UUID of the bundle containing the case file

etlVersionUuid.description: UUID of the ETL version used for processing

organizationUuid.description: UUID of the organization that owns this case file

customData.description: Additional metadata and context for the job

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the job was created

payloadHash.description: SHA-256 hash of the payload, used for verification when checking job status

statusCode.description: HTTP status code of the error.

type.description: The type of the queue job (e.g., 'casefile_creation')

result.description: The result of the queue job execution, returned as JSON when the job is completed. Contains the outcome and any relevant data.

jobStatus.description: Current status of the job. Possible values 'pending' (waiting to be processed), 'processing' (currently being executed), 'completed' (successfully finished), 'failed' (execution failed), 'aborted_duplicated' (aborted due to duplication)

payload.description: The original payload submitted with the job, stored as JSON. Contains the case file data and metadata.

retries.description: The number of times the job has been retried after a failure

createdAt.description: The date and time when the queue job was created

updatedAt.description: The date and time when the queue job was last updated

maxRetries.description: The maximum number of retries allowed for this job before it is marked as failed

payloadHash.description: SHA-256 hash of the payload, used for verification and security purposes

errorMessage.description: Error message describing why the job failed, if applicable. Only present when jobStatus is 'failed'.

uuid.description: The UUID of the job to check. This is returned when the job is created.

payloadHash.description: The SHA-256 hash of the payload. This is returned when the job is created and is used to verify the request authenticity.

message.description: Error message indicating lack of permissions.

statusCode.description: HTTP status code indicating unauthorized access.

message.description: Human-readable error message explaining that the job was not found

statusCode.description: HTTP status code indicating the resource was not found

storeAsContact.description: Signer will be stored as a contact. Defaults to true.
